name: GEN Ukraine
description: GEN Ukraine Vision and Mission We are a unified friendly community consisting of over 60 ecovillages around Ukraine. We have succeeded in bringing environmental lifestyle and the latest innovations together. Now we and our children together confidently advance in sustainable development to meet a wonderful future of our country! About GEN Ukraine is a inspiring example of how we can work together in times of crisis. Together with ‘Permaculture in Ukraine’, the GEN Ukraine started the project “The Green Road of Ecovillages” on the second day of the full-scale invasion on 25/02/2022. These organisations joined forces, mobilized their networks (one of ecovillages and one of permaculture centers), and created a map of locations ready to accommodate people seeking short-term or long-term shelte...

name: ERO – Ekobyarnas Riksorganisation
GEN-Russia
SKEY (Suomen Kestävän Elämäntavan Yhteisöt) or GEN-Finland
description: SKEY (Suomen Kestävän Elämäntavan Yhteisöt) or GEN-Finland Vision and Mission SKEY promotes sustainable lifestyle and communality in all if it's networks locally and internationally. It strengthens the cooperation of Finnish ecovillages and other local communities that are striving for a sustainable lifestyle. It hosts events, offers education, promotes student exchage programs, operates in self-sufficient permacultural gardening projects and serves as a coordinator in the ecovillage network. It's vision holds an increased amount of active ecovillages in Finland that co-operate with each other. In a long-term vision on societal level a transition to social, ecological, economical and cultural sustainability has been achieved. About SKEY brings local eco-communities together for nationwide ...

name: GEN-Suisse
description:
GEN-Suisse Vision and Mission GEN-Suisse is committed to bring about a holistically sustainable world. About GEN-Suisse self-identifies as a ‘community of communities’. The multilingual network connects communities in Switzerland as well as some individual ecovillage enthousiasts. 
Every year, GEN-Suisse holds a spring celebration for members and a summercamp conference open to all. One of the opportunities for members is the “ecovillage couchsurfing”: the chance to visit any member community for up to a week. Country: Switzerland Year of foundation: 2011 Legal entity: Association Governance method: Sociocracy Members: 13 full members, 3 aspiring members and 61 individual/supporting members Website: https://gen-suisse.ch Contact: info (at) gen-suisse.ch

name: BelgEco / GEN Belgium
description:
BelgEco / GEN Belgium Vision and Mission BelgEco’s vision mission is to create and promote international links (including with the members of the GEN network) and national links with eco-communities based in Belgium that are intentionally and participatively designed and locally anchored. About Funded in 2021, BelgEco is one of the youngest European ecovillage networks. Two  Belgian organisations,  the Flemish speaking Samenhuizen and the French speaking Habitat de participation created this nation-wide,  multilingual network of ecovillages.
Crossing language barriers, BelgEco is today entirely run by volunteers and has already enabled 100 young people to participate in Youth Exchanges. 
Through WESEEN, an exchange project between Eastern and Western European ecovillage networks, set up ...

name: GEN NL – ecodorpen netwerk
description:
GEN NL - ecodorpen netwerk Vision and Mission VISION: We see a world in which individuals and communities authentically shape their lives from their own strength in a conscious, essentially sustainable and loving way and thereby inspire others.

MISSION:We are a Dutch partnership that supports the network of individuals and communities who strive for a sustainable lifestyle. About The Netherlands are home to one of Europe’s oldest ecovillages: Hobbitstee was founded in 1969. Today, the Dutch network consists of around 50 ecovillages. Harvesting from the rich history and experience, GEN NL was a co-creator of CLIPS - Community Learning Incubator, an ERASMUS+ project  led by GEN Europe. 
GEN NL is an active web of volunteers who organize themselves sociocratically. Each year, GEN NL organ...

name: GEN-Deutschland
description:
GEN Deutschland Vision and Mission The purpose of GEN Deutschland is to foster connection: Interconnection of German ecovillages for exchange and cooperation as well connection to the wider public.  The aim to spread a regenerative lifestyle throughout the four dimensions of sustainability (ecology, economy, culture and social). About Gen Deutschland is a sociocratic organization: it is organized in working groups - ‘circles’ as they are often called in Sociocracy. Each circle focuses on one of the four dimensions of sustainability: ecology, economy, social issues and culture. In addition, there is a working group for administration.  Represents of each circle meet together with the 3 council members in the management circle in order to coordinate the work.
GEN Deutschland aims to share t...

name: Cooperative Oasis
description: Coorpérative Oasis Vision and Mission Throughout France, citizen collectives are creating new ecological and supportive places called eco-hamlets, participatory habitats, collective farms, third places… We call them oases. Coopérative Oasis supports those who live or wish to live in these ecological places and collectives, the oases. It reveals the reality of the thousand projects existing today in France, and the possibilites to stay or settle there. The Cooperative supports those who want to create their own place. Finally, Oasis creates a link between places so that they become aware that they are part of a real network they can count on. The Cooperative thus allows another mode of life to emerge, a more intense, sober and happy way of living in the world. About The social enterprise wi...

name: RIVE – Rete Italiana Villaggi Ecologici
description: Rete Italiana Villaggi Ecologici Vision and Mission The Italian network of ecological villages - RIVE believes that community life experiences are real social and educational experimentation laboratories for a better world. It recognizes as the ethical basis of its work the social equity based on spiritual, economic and ecological harmony. It promotes the spread of existing community and ecovillage experiences and the support for newly born communities. RIVE supports and collaborates with all the realities that work for a culture of peace, mutual acceptance, respect for diversity and solidarity. About Initiated by some of Europe’s most known ecovillages (Damanhur, Popolo degli Elfi, Bagnaia and Torri Superiore) the Italian Ecovillage Network RIVE is one of the oldest European Ecovillage Ne...

name: Baltic Ecovillage Network
description:
Baltic Ecovillage Network Vision and Mission Mission: BEN is a network of organizations which promotes environmental protection and restoration of ecological and social systems through collaboration, education, social methods, technical solutions, youth work, culture, intercultural understanding between people and environmental protection. 
Vision: to build a strong network of eco-communities in the Baltic region which will contribute to implement green transition to regenerative lifestyle and economy where the well-being of all parts of Nature is important and life within Planetary boundaries is possible. About The Baltic Ecovillage Network (BEN) is an association of national ecovillage networks of the Baltic Sea Region. As a regional network, BEN unites a broad diversity of cultures and...

name: Red Ibérica de Ecoaldeas (RIE)
Landsforeningen for Økosamfund (LØS)
description: Landsforeningen for Økosamfund (LØS) Vision and Mission Connecting Danish ecovillages, supporting new communities with the goal to re-establish whole circulatory systems on all levels in nature and people. About LØS publishes a printed magazine twice a year as well as online content. Members can use LØS as a platform to announce projects, their communication, as well as promotion and networking opportunities. LØS also offers services related to consultancy, education, an online webinar every third month known as “Friday for Community”. Country: Denmark Year of foundation: 1993 Legal entity: Danish Association Governance method: Sociocratic council Members: 27 established ecovillages, plus around 50 supporting and aspiring members Website: https://okosamfund.dk Contact: sekretariatet(at)oko...
